# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

COPY . .

RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -o /app/service .

FROM alpine:3.20

WORKDIR /app

RUN adduser -D -g '' appuser

COPY --from=builder /app/service /app/service

USER appuser

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["/app/service"]
